title: verbascum trichostylum
intro: Verbascum trichostylum, also known as the large-flowered mullein, is a biennial plant belonging to the figwort family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Verbascum trichostylum include relieving coughs, soothing sore throats, and reducing inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
